_comment: Merge this block into your Claude Desktop config file. The wizard (python3 tools/wizard.py) writes these entries automatically. This file is for manual setup or reference.

google-workspace._comment: Optional. Added by wizard when you connect Google. Requires uv (pip install uv). Covers Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, and Sheets.

microsoft-365._comment: Optional. Added by wizard when you connect Microsoft. Requires Node.js 20+. Covers Outlook, Calendar, Excel, OneDrive, and 200+ Microsoft 365 tools.

wolfram-alpha._comment: Optional. Exact symbolic computation. Free tier: 2,000 calls/month. Get App ID at developer.wolframalpha.com.

e2b-code-interpreter._comment: Optional. Sandboxed Python with scipy/numpy/pandas/matplotlib. Get API key at e2b.dev.

stats-compass._comment: Optional. 50+ pandas-based statistical tools. No API key needed.

duckdb-analytics._comment: Optional. Analytical SQL engine for CSV/Parquet/JSON. No API key for local mode.

jupyter-notebook._comment: Optional. Persistent Jupyter notebook sessions. No API key needed.

postiz._comment: Optional. Self-hosted social media scheduler (open source, AGPL-3.0). Covers Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, and 30+ platforms. Requires Postiz Docker stack running locally or on a server. See docs.postiz.com for setup. Enables the postiz_mcp capability flag in Creator OS.
